verses.text: “Mi khatpeuh in Topa' tungah an tawh biakna hong paipih leh, ama biakpiakna pen annel hi ding hi. Amah in tua annel tungah sathau sungin, paknamtui koihin

tua ciangin Aaron' suan siampite kiangah paipih ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in annel khutdim leh sathau, a paknamtui khempeuh tawh la ding a, siampipa in hih pen Topa-a' dingin a gim namtui, mei tawh biakna, phawkna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi
An tawh biakna a valteng pen Aaron leh a tapate-a' ding hi ding hi. Tua pen Topa' tungah mei tawh biakna sung panin a siangtho pen ahi hi
“Nangmah in biakna dingin meibung sunga ki-em an tawh biakna na paipih ciangin, silngo sawhloh, sathau tawh a kizut mohpheng hi ding hi
“Na biakna pen beelpei dai tunga ki-em an tawh biakna ahih leh, sathau tawh a kibawl annel hi ding hi
Balnenin a tungah sathau na sung ding hi. Tua pen an tawh biakna ahi hi
“Na biakna pen sikbeel dai sunga kihuan an tawh biakna ahih leh, sathau tawh a kibawl annel hi ding hi
Nangmah in hih nate tawh a kibawl an tawh biakna, Topa' kiangah na paipih ding a, siampipa kiangah a kipaipih ciangin amah in biakna tau-ah paipih ding hi
Siampipa in an tawh biakna panin a phawkna biakna teng la-in, Topa' tungah a gim namtui, mei tawh biakna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi
An tawh biakna a valteng pen Aaron leh a tapate-a' ding hi ding hi. Tua pen Topa' tungah mei tawh biakna sung panin a siangthopen ahi hi
“ Topa' tungah na paipih an tawh biakna pen silngo tawh kibawllo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh silngo hita leh khuaizu hita leh khat peuhpeuh Topa' tungah meihal biakna-in na hal kei ding hi
Anpal tawh biakna ahih leh Topa' kiangah na paipih thei ding hi. Ahih hangin a gim namtui dingin biakna tau tungah kipia lo ding hi
An tawh na biaknate khempeuh ci na sawh ding hi. An tawh na biakna-ah na Pasian tawh na thuciamna ci sawhloin na om kei ding a, na biakna khempeuh ci na sawh ding hi
“Anpal tawh Topa' tungah biakna na piak leh, anpal tawh na biakna dingin a vui thak panin kila-in a kigawivui, mei-ah a kihangkeu na pia ding hi
Nang in a tungah sathau sungin, paknamtui na buak ding hi. Tua pen an tawh biakna ahi hi
Siampipa in phawkna dingin a kigawivui an pawlkhat leh a sathau leh a paknamtui khempeuh hal ding hi. Tua pen Topa' tungah meihal biakna ahi hi.
